if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND b.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND b.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlog :: selectById */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , bct.blog_cate_nm AS blog_cate_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM cm_blog b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN cm_blog_cate bct ON bct.blog_cate_id = b.blog_cate_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = b.prod_id WHERE b.blog_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlog :: selectList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , bct.blog_cate_nm AS blog_cate_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM cm_blog b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN cm_blog_cate bct ON bct.blog_cate_id = b.blog_cate_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = b.prod_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlog :: selectPageList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , bct.blog_cate_nm AS blog_cate_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM cm_blog b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN cm_blog_cate bct ON bct.blog_cate_id = b.blog_cate_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = b.prod_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(b.*) /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlog :: selectPageCount */ FROM cm_blog b
